# `vendor/` — vendored third-party sources (offline, self-contained)

This directory bundles the external sources Xarena's evaluation/training images
need so the project is **buildable from a fresh clone with no machine-specific
private paths**. Each algorithm/eval `build.sh` stages its Docker build context
(`_ctx/`) from here via repo-relative paths — see
`leadeboard_apps/spreadsheets_bench/*/build.sh`.

Nothing here is generated at build time; it ships in the repo on purpose. Build
artifacts (`_ctx/`, `offline_wheels/`) are **not** vendored — they are
regenerated by `build.sh` and are `.gitignore`d.

## Contents & attribution

| Path | Upstream | License | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `SkillOpt/` | [microsoft/SkillOpt](https://github.com/microsoft/SkillOpt) | MIT (Copyright (c) Microsoft Corporation) — see `SkillOpt/LICENSE` | Training optimizer + `scripts/{train.py,eval_only.py}` (the single-mode evaluator). Vendored without `.git/data/runs/outputs`. |
| `Trace2Skill/` | [Qwen-Applications/Trace2Skill](https://github.com/Qwen-Applications/Trace2Skill) | Apache-2.0 — see `Trace2Skill/LICENSE` | Trajectory→skill evolution pipeline. Vendored without `data/` (huge) and `.git`. **The vendored snapshot had no top-level LICENSE file; the README declares Apache-2.0, so a canonical Apache-2.0 `LICENSE` was added here** (with a vendoring note). The bundled `released_skills/*/LICENSE.txt` are Anthropic Skill artifact licenses and are left untouched. |
| `xskill/` | [SkillNerds/xskill](https://github.com/SkillNerds/xskill) | MIT — see `xskill/LICENSE` | Distills reusable Skills from agent trajectories; provides the `xskill` CLI (`xskill serve`). Vendored without `.git/.claude/docs/tests`. The `algo_xskill` image installs it editable (`pip install -e vendor/xskill`) with `SETUPTOOLS_SCM_PRETEND_VERSION` because there is no `.git` to derive a version from. Verified: `xskill serve --help` works from this vendored copy. |
| `data_root/` | SpreadsheetBench (verified 400-task subset, redistributed via the Trace2Skill data tree) | See upstream SpreadsheetBench / Trace2Skill | The 26 MB SpreadsheetBench dataset (`dataset.json` + `spreadsheet/<id>/*.xlsx`) baked into the training/eval images as `/data`. Symlinks were dereferenced (`cp -rL`) so the files are real and self-contained. |
| `sync_skills_to.sh` | xskill experiment harness | (script) | Reference helper that materializes promoted (main-branch) xskill skills into a target `.claude/skills` dir. The xskill algo entrypoint uses its own `collect_skills`; this is kept for compatibility. The original hardcoded host path was replaced with env-driven config (`XSKILL_SKILL_DIR` / `XSKILL_HOME`). |

## Licensing summary

- **SkillOpt** — MIT (Microsoft Corporation).
- **xskill** — MIT (370025263).
- **Trace2Skill** — Apache-2.0 (LICENSE added during vendoring per upstream README, since the snapshot shipped none — see the note in `Trace2Skill/LICENSE`).
- **SpreadsheetBench data** (`data_root/`) — governed by the upstream SpreadsheetBench dataset terms; redistributed here only as a small evaluation subset for reproducibility.

If you redistribute Xarena, retain these LICENSE files. To refresh a vendored
source, re-run the corresponding upstream checkout and re-copy with the same
excludes used here (no `.git`, no large `data/`).
